device_name: V8/XV8/XH8, V7/XV7/XH7, V6/XV6/XH6 Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The diagnostic ultrasound system and transducers are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-ope
intended_use_full: The diagnostic ultrasound system and transducers are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-operative, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric, Thoracic, Trans-esophageal (Cardiac) and Peripheral vessel. It is intended for use by, or by the order of, and under the supervision of, an appropriately trained healthcare professional who is qualified for direct use of medical devices.
target_condition: Peripheral nerve identification for regional anesthesia and nerve block procedures
ground_truth: Manual contour segmentation and nerve location marking by 12 anesthesiologists and 5 sonographers with over 10 years' experience, with verification and correction by at least 2 additional anesthesiologists and sonographers
other_metrics: Speed: 3.66 FPS (detection) and 3.64 FPS (segmentation); 95% CI for detection accuracy: 87.28% to 93.33%; 95% CI for segmentation accuracy: 97.13% to 99.71%; Standard Deviation for detection: 4.88%; Standard Deviation for segmentation: 3.99%
